file.markdownDescription:
TSV/CSV file to load

The target .tsv/.csv lookup file to load

keyField.markdownDescription:
TenXObject field name to use as lookup key

Specifies a field name whose value to extract from a target TenXObject to use as the lookup key, that is the value used to search for a matching value within the lookup file.

valueField.markdownDescription:
TenXObject field name to use as the lookup value

Specifies the field name with the target TenXObject to set with the result lookup value acquired by searching the table for the value of [lookupKeyField](https://doc.log10x.com/run/initialize/lookup/#lookupkeyfield).

valueColumn.markdownDescription:
Name of lookup value column

Specifies a column in the [lookupFile](https://doc.log10x.com/run/initialize/lookup/#lookupfile) whose value to assign from the first column in the table (i.e., the key column) into [lookupValueField](https://doc.log10x.com/run/initialize/lookup/#lookupvaluefield) based on the value of  the [lookupKeyField](https://doc.log10x.com/run/initialize/lookup/#lookupkeyfield) field value. (Default: second column in table (first column is assumed as the key))
valueColumn.default: second column in table (first column is assumed as the key)
